home.title:
Reliable Car Repair
in Duffel, Belgium
home.subtitle: Trusted auto repair since 2024 — honest diagnostics, reliable service, and a team that respects your time.

services.title: Services we provide
services.subtitle: Professional automotive solutions delivered with precision, reliability, and attention to every detail.

maintenance.title: Minor & Major Maintenance
maintenance.description: Comprehensive routine servicing including oil changes, filters, fluids, and full inspections to ensure long-term reliability and performance.

brakes.title: Brake Replacement Service
brakes.description: Thorough brake system inspection and professional replacement of pads and discs for maximum safety and smooth braking.

dpf.title: DPF Cleaning & Replacement
dpf.description: Advanced DPF diagnostics, cleaning, and replacement to restore engine efficiency and maintain proper emission standards.

electrical_repairs.title: Auto Electrical Repairs
electrical_repairs.description: Precise diagnostics and repair of wiring, sensors, batteries, starters, and complex onboard electronic systems.

benefits.title: Why belgian car service stands out
benefits.subtitle: Honest service, skilled technicians, and a customer-first approach that sets us apart.

pricing.title: Competitive Pricing
pricing.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees or unnecessary services.

quality.title: Quality Workmanship
quality.description: We follow standards and use proven, reliable parts.

fast.title: Fast Service
fast.description: Efficient processes ensure faster-than-average repair times.

vehicle.title: 5 Vehicle Lifts Available
vehicle.description: Equipped with several lifts, including one heavy-duty, for cars and commercial vans.

honest.title: Honest Approach
honest.description: No upselling, no inflated work, only what your vehicle truly needs.

experience.title: Experienced Team
experience.description: 8 skilled specialists with strong hands-on mechanical expertise.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.description: Your data is handled with transparency, security, and full compliance with European data protection standards.

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.description:
At Belgian Car Service, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what information we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it. 

 We process personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable laws in Belgium.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
2.description: When you use our website or book a service, we may collect:

1.title: Information You Provide Through Forms:
list: Selected Service (e.g., Diagnostics, Tire Service & Fitting)

3.title: 3. Why We Collect This Data

1.title: We use your data to:
list: Prepare diagnostics based on VIN information
Provide accurate repair and maintenance services
Issue invoices and maintain accounting records
Improve our services and website performance

3.end_description: We do not sell or rent your personal information.

1.title: We process your data based on:
list: Consent (if you opt in to marketing communication)

5.title: 5. Data Retention

1.title: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to:

5.end_description: After this period, data is securely deleted or anonymized.

6.title: 6. Your Rights

1.title: Under GDPR, you have the right to:

6.end_description: To exercise your rights, contact us at:

7.title: 7. Data Security
7.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, misuse, or loss.

website_terms.title: Website Terms
website_terms.description: Clear terms that define the proper use of our website and services.

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.description:
These Website Terms govern your access to and use of the Belgian Car Service website. 

 By accessing or using the Website, you agree to comply with these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Website.

2.title: 2. Use Of The Website
2.description: You agree to use the Website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not:

list: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Disrupt or interfere with the Website's functionality
Attempt unauthorized access to our systems

2.end_description: We reserve the right to restrict or terminate access if misuse is suspected.

3.title: 3. Service Information
3.description:
All information on the Website, including service descriptions, pricing credits, and availability, is provided for general informational purposes. 

 While we aim to keep content accurate and up to date, we do not guarantee that all information is always complete, accurate, or current. 

 Service bookings are subject to confirmation.

4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
4.description:
All content on the Website — including text, graphics, logos, design elements, and layout — is the property of Belgian Car Service unless otherwise stated. 

 You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or reuse Website content without prior written permission.

5.title: 5. Limitation Of Liability
5.description: Belgian Car Service shall not be liable for:

list: Indirect or consequential damages arising from Website use

5.end_description: Use of the Website is at your own risk.

6.title: 6. Third-Party Links
6.description: Our Website may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content, security, or privacy practices of third-party sites.

7.title: 7. Changes To These Terms
7.description:
We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Changes become effective immediately upon publication on this page. 

 We encourage users to review this page periodically.

8.title: 8. Governing Law
8.description:
These Terms are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of Belgium. 

 Any disputes arising from Website use shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Belgian courts.

9.title: 9. Contact Information
9.description: If you have any questions regarding these Terms, please contact:

thank_you: Thank you for your trust! We will process your request within 30 minutes and respond during business hours.
